name: ADR validator rejects a file whose name does not match the four-digit-id slug-text pattern
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# Bad\n' > docs/adr/bad-name.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/validate-naming.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_name=bad-name.md' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
